description_long: This is a modern, military-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a fixed synthetic stock and a prominent carrying handle integrated into the upper receiver. The handguard is ribbed for grip and extends forward to meet a standard-length barrel, which is capped with a small flash hider. The magazine is a detachable box type, inserted just ahead of the trigger guard, and the trigger assembly is housed within a robust lower receiver. The rifle is equipped with basic iron sights, with the front sight post mounted near the muzzle and the rear sight integrated into the carrying handle. The overall design is streamlined and utilitarian, with no visible attachments or accessories beyond the standard components. The construction appears to be primarily metal with polymer elements for the stock and handguard.
description: A matte black, military-style rifle with a fixed stock, ribbed handguard, carrying handle, and standard iron sights. Features a detachable box magazine and a flash hider at the barrel tip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the fixed stock, carrying handle, ribbed handguard, and flash hider.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel end, flash hider, and narrow profile of the handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features of the first side, with the magazine and trigger assembly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the back of the carrying handle, with the barrel extending away.
